goals.title: Build a new static puppy-shop website under /Users/cosmos/Documents/p...
goals.objective: Build a new static puppy-shop website under /Users/cosmos/Documents/pet that feels immediately almost identical in mood to local references pet-ss2 and pet-ss. Reuse local design patterns and assets heavily: BB PUPPY-like header, beige/charcoal/Pretendard visual language, hero with puppy imagery, babies category grid, product cards, review/contact sections, floating CTA rail, and responsive mobile behavior. Must write tests before implementation, capture RED then GREEN output, serve locally, and perform browser QA screenshots/artifacts. Do not publish or copy sensitive tokens; do not use backend dependencies.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Build a new static puppy-shop website under /Users/cosmos/Documents/pet that...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.

goals.title: Build a new static puppy-shop website under /Users/cosmos/Documents/p...
goals.objective: Build a new static puppy-shop website under /Users/cosmos/Documents/pet that feels immediately almost identical in mood to local references pet-ss2 and pet-ss. Reuse local design patterns and assets heavily: BB PUPPY-like header, beige/charcoal/Pretendard visual language, hero with puppy imagery, babies category grid, product cards, review/contact sections, floating CTA rail, and responsive mobile behavior. Must write tests before implementation, capture RED then GREEN output, serve locally, and perform browser QA screenshots/artifacts. Do not publish or copy sensitive tokens; do not use backend dependencies.
